startPoint.en: Talk to Larry at the Ardougne Zoo.
startPoint.es: Habla con Larry en el Ardougne Zoo.

children.name: Silk
children.display: 1 silk, 1 plank and 1 clockwork to make one

items.name: Plank
items.display: 4 normal planks (protean planks do not work)

items.name: Worn Equipment
items.display: Nothing equipped in the main hand, off-hand and back slots

recommended.name: Clocktower Teleport
recommended.display: Clocktower Teleport scrolls for quick access to Larry

recommended.name: Dramen staff
recommended.display: A Dramen or lunar staff for fairy ring teleport to the Rellekka Hunter area (DKS), unless you have completed A Fairy Tale III - Battle at Ork's Rift

children.name: Watchtower Teleport
children.display: Watchtower Teleport or ring of duelling to Castle Wars

children.name: Yanille tablet
children.display: Yanille tablet after completing Love Story quest

recommended.name: Energy
recommended.display: A way to recover run energy, such as resting, an explorer's ring, energy potions, and super energy potions

children.name: As a First Resort
children.display: If As a First Resort is completed, the salt-water spring in the Oo'glog gives unlimited run energy for up to 24 minutes

children.name: Spa pool
children.display: The spa pool in the Anachronia base camp

recommended.name: Do not take armour or weapons as no combat is involved. Familiars are also not recommended as they cannot be taken into some of the quest areas
recommended.display: Do not take armour or weapons as no combat is involved. Familiars are also not recommended as they cannot be taken into some of the quest areas

rewards.name: Penguin Hunter area
rewards.display: Access to the Penguin Hunter area

rewards.name: Penguin Hide and Seek
rewards.display: A Penguin Hide and Seek Distraction and Diversion bonus. A polar bear can be spotted once each week. Its location is the same on every world. It hides inside a well and pops up every few seconds. Inspect the well to spy on the polar bear for 1 penguin point.

rewards.name: Chuck
rewards.display: Chuck the Polar Bear, located in a cage just south-east of the Penguin enclosure, replaces Larry in the Penguin Hide and Seek activity. At this time, Larry cannot be accessed.

rewards.name: Puffer
rewards.display: Puffer, Ray, Octopus, and Monkfish hats.

rewards.name: Ice Day for Penguins
rewards.display: Ice Day for Penguins (Unlocked in the Penguin Hunter area after the quest)

text.en: Talk to Larry in the south-west of the Ardougne Zoo and agree to help.
text.es: Habla con Larry al suroeste del Ardougne Zoo y acepta ayudarle.

text.en: Go east to the south coast of Witchaven, and inspect one of the giant footprints on the western side of the southern coast.
text.es: Ve al este, hasta la costa sur de Witchaven, e inspecciona una de las huellas gigantes en el lado occidental de la costa sur.

text.en: Return to Larry for a cutscene.
text.es: Vuelve con Larry para ver una escena.

text.en: Penguin suit, 8 Silk, 4 (regular) Planks and 1 Thread
North-east of Rellekka (north of Fremennik lodestone), travel via the small boat to the Iceberg.
text.es: Al noreste de Rellekka (al norte de la piedra de viaje de Fremennik), viaja en el pequeño bote hasta el Iceberg.

text.en: Talk to Larry.
text.es: Habla con Larry.

text.en: North-west, investigate the avalanche.
text.es: Al noroeste, investiga la avalancha.

text.en: Enter the west room, speak to KGP Interrogator.
text.es: Entra en la sala oeste y habla con el KGP Interrogator.

chatOptions: 1 My captain trusted me to deliver the message.
2 Your captain must trust you a great deal.
1 My captain found a greater leader.
3 What leader could possibly be greater than the Pescaling.
2 The sea may control your Captain, but he controls your life.
1 He will bring unity by destroying the humans.
3 Why not unite all penguins to The Sea, first.
2 If he comes to rescue you, he'll be captured.
1 'Our sacrifice'? Only you appear to be making the sacrifice.

text.en: Talk to captured penguin and note down the three dance emotes.
text.es: Habla con el pingüino capturado y anota las tres emociones de baile.

text.en: Search the crate behind you to get a conch shell, puffer, octopus, monkfish, and a ray.
text.es: Registra el cajón que tienes detrás para conseguir una concha de caracola, un pez globo, un pulpo, un mero y una raya.

text.en: Take note of which headwear the captured penguin is wearing.
text.es: Fíjate en qué tocado lleva puesto el pingüino capturado.

text.en: The fish hat will either be a puffer, octopus, monkfish, or ray fish.
text.es: El sombrero de pez será un pez globo, un pulpo, un mero o una raya.

text.en: Talk to Ping & Pong (who are in a room north-east from interrogation room).
text.es: Habla con Ping & Pong (que están en una sala al noreste de la sala de interrogatorios).

text.en: Talk to the KGP Agent by the control panel to the north.
text.es: Habla con el KGP Agent junto al panel de control al norte.

text.en: Return to Ping & Pong.
text.es: Vuelve con Ping & Pong.

text.en: Return to the KGP Agent by the control panel. Sing him the lullaby.
text.es: Vuelve con el KGP Agent junto al panel de control. Cántale la nana.

chatOptions: 2 I want to sing you a song.

text.en: Operate the control panel. Head north-east into the war room.
text.es: Opera el panel de control. Dirígete al noreste, a la sala de guerra.

text.en: Talk to any dwarf.
text.es: Habla con cualquier enano.

text.en: Speak to the dwarf again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con el enano.

text.en: Exit war room to get caught.
text.es: Sal de la sala de guerra y déjate atrapar.

text.en: Talk to Larry (twice).
text.es: Habla con Larry (dos veces).

text.en: Re-enter the hideout via the avalanche and return to the dwarves.
text.es: Vuelve a entrar en el escondite a través de la avalancha y regresa con los enanos.

text.en: Talk to them again and give them the supplies to get a toolbox.
text.es: Habla con ellos de nuevo y entrégales los suministros para conseguir una caja de herramientas.

text.en: Perform practice run on the engine panel north of the dwarves.
text.es: Realiza una prueba de práctica en el panel del motor al norte de los enanos.

text.en: Wrench -> wirebox.
text.es: Wrench -> wirebox.

text.en: Wire cutter -> wirebox.
text.es: Wire cutter -> wirebox.

text.en: Wire -> wirebox.
text.es: Wire -> wirebox.

text.en: Tape -> wirebox.
text.es: Tape -> wirebox.

text.en: Bellows -> pipe.
text.es: Bellows -> pipe.

text.en: Click bellows twice, the pressure gauge will point to the red.
text.es: Haz clic en el fuelle dos veces; el manómetro apuntará hacia el rojo.

text.en: Turn valve wheel three times, the pressure gauge arrow points straight up in the green.
text.es: Gira la rueda de la válvula tres veces; la flecha del manómetro apuntará hacia arriba, en verde.

text.en: Pull lever.
text.es: Tira de la palanca.

text.en: Talk to a dwarf again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con un enano.

text.en: Exit war room to get caught.
text.es: Sal de la sala de guerra y déjate atrapar.

text.en: Talk to Larry.
text.es: Habla con Larry.

text.en: North-west, talk to Noodle.
text.es: Al noroeste, habla con Noodle.

text.en: Re-enter the hideout via the avalanche. Enter first room to the east.
text.es: Vuelve a entrar en el escondite a través de la avalancha. Entra en la primera sala al este.

steps.caption: A map of the office, showing the route to the sorting table.

text.en: Navigate to the sorting table without being spotted using the picture to the right (see the full guide for more details).
text.es: Navega hasta la mesa de clasificación sin que te descubran, usando el cuadro a la derecha (consulta la guía completa para más detalles).

text.en: Search sorting table to get a telegram. Exit the small room and ensure the door is closed before you move further.
text.es: Registra la mesa de clasificación para conseguir un telegrama. Sal de la pequeña sala y asegúrate de cerrar la puerta antes de seguir avanzando.

text.en: Navigate back out of the office the way you came, without being spotted. Once back in the main hall, exit using the southern door. If you are caught you will lose the item and have to repeat the process.
text.es: Regresa fuera de la oficina por donde viniste, sin que te descubran. Una vez de vuelta en el salón principal, sal por la puerta sur. Si te atrapan, perderás el objeto y tendrás que repetir el proceso.

text.en: Return to Larry and talk to him twice.
text.es: Vuelve con Larry y habla con él dos veces.

text.en: The toolbox, the fish hats, the conch shell, penguin suit
Southeast of Yanille, just outside the city walls, talk to Larry.
text.es: Al sureste de Yanille, justo fuera de las murallas de la ciudad, habla con Larry.

text.en: Enter the penguin suit and wear the fish hat the captured penguin was wearing.
text.es: Ponte el traje de pingüino y colócate el sombrero de pez que llevaba el pingüino capturado.

text.en: Blow the conch shell, then perform the three emotes.
text.es: Sopla la concha de caracola y realiza las tres emociones.

text.en: Climb up the ladder and walk all the way to the east, opening doors along the way.
text.es: Sube por la escalera y camina hacia el este todo lo que puedas, abriendo las puertas por el camino.

text.en: Talk to Captain Marlin.
text.es: Habla con Captain Marlin.

text.en: Pick either honest or lie.
text.es: Elige entre ser sincero o mentir.

text.en: In the brig, walk west and search the hatstand to get an electric eel, shark tooth, crab claw, seaweed, and a swordfish.
text.es: En el calabozo, camina hacia el oeste y registra el perchero para conseguir una anguila eléctrica, un diente de tiburón, una pinza de cangrejo, algas y un pez espada.

text.en: Open the east door.
text.es: Abre la puerta este.

text.en: Inspect the engine panel.
text.es: Inspecciona el panel del motor.

text.en: Crab claw -> wirebox.
text.es: Crab claw -> wirebox.

text.en: Shark tooth -> wirebox.
text.es: Shark tooth -> wirebox.

text.en: Electric eel -> wirebox.
text.es: Electric eel -> wirebox.

text.en: Seaweed -> wirebox.
text.es: Seaweed -> wirebox.

text.en: Pufferfish -> pipe.
text.es: Pufferfish -> pipe.

text.en: Click pufferfish twice, the pressure gauge will point to the red.
text.es: Haz clic en el pez globo dos veces; el manómetro apuntará hacia el rojo.

text.en: Octopus -> Turn valve wheel three times, the pressure gauge arrow points straight up in the green.
text.es: Octopus -> Gira la rueda de la válvula tres veces; la flecha del manómetro apuntará hacia arriba, en verde.

text.en: Swordfish -> lever.
text.es: Swordfish -> lever.

text.en: Pull the lever.
text.es: Tira de la palanca.

text.en: Talk to Chuck towards the east side of the island to leave the island and get a cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Chuck, hacia el lado este de la isla, para abandonar la isla y ver una escena.

text.en: If you teleport off the island, talk to Chuck at the Ardougne Zoo to get teleported back to the Desert Island and talk to him again once there.
text.es: Si te teletransportas fuera de la isla, habla con Chuck en el Ardougne Zoo para que te teletransporte de vuelta a Desert Island y habla con él de nuevo una vez allí.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
